content.speakerText: Thanks so much! So, 5 books, 2 weeks, can renew online?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢了！就是5本、两周、能在线续借，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Exactly! Have a great day reading!
Yep, that's right. Don't forget to renew before the due date.
Correct! You can renew online up to two times. Enjoy your books!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认了对方提到的5本书、两周期限和在线续借信息
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误，使用了恰当的道别表达
表达自然度：语气友好，符合日常口语习惯，有自然的语调起伏
关键词覆盖：使用了 'exactly', 'renew', 'online', 'due date', 'enjoy' 等场景关键词

expectedAnswers: See you then! Don't forget your library card!
Looking forward to it! Have a great day!
Cool, bye! Make sure you bring your card next time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：积极回应对方的道别，并适当补充提醒信息
语言准确性：使用了正确的道别句型和口语表达，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气自然，符合真实对话节奏，避免生硬或机械重复
关键词覆盖：使用了 'see you then', 'library card', 'have a great day' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Alright, I'm off now. Really appreciate your help!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我要走了，非常感谢你的帮助！
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
No problem at all! See you soon!
Glad I could help! Take care and enjoy your day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应感谢，并自然结束对话
语言准确性：使用了正确的道别和致谢句型，语法无误
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合日常英语口语习惯，不机械
关键词覆盖：使用了 'you're welcome', 'have a wonderful day', 'see you soon', 'take care' 等道别高频表达
